ddls:
CREATE TABLE "education_expenditure" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the expenditure data is recorded */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the data is recorded */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level for which the expenditure is allocated */,
  "expenditure_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of GDP allocated to education at the specified level */,
  "expenditure_type" TEXT /* Type of expenditure (e.g., recurrent, capital) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding (e.g., government, private) */,
  "allocated_budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the expenditure */,
  "utilized_budget" REAL /* Utilized budget for the expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_expenditure_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_expenditure_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_expenditure_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent on which the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the continent */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_continent FOREIGN KEY ("continent") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "level_code" TEXT /* Code for the education level (e.g., ISCED 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* The year value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_expenditure_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_id") REFERENCES education_expenditure ("expenditure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the report is generated */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the report is generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, thematic) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expenditure record included in the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  "data_sources" TEXT /* Sources of data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_expenditure_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_id") REFERENCES education_expenditure ("expenditure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_authorship" (
  "authorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authorship record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_authorship_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES report_authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_authorship_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_growth" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the GDP growth rate is recorded */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the country in the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_growth_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inflation_rates" (
  "inflation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inflation record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the inflation rate is recorded */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the country in the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inflation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inflation_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
